case_title: RHODES JACOBS CHIROPRACTIC CORPORATION VS. JOSE CISNEROS

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF NON-SERVICE & REQUEST FOR RESET OF COURT DATE. FILED BY PLAINTIFF RHODES JACOBS CHIROPRACTIC CORPORATION

BENCH LETTER ISSUED FOR JUN-16-2011; JUDGMENT DEBTOR JOSE CISNEROS FAILED TO APPEAR. WARRANT OF ATTACHMENT ORDERED ISSUED. BAIL SET AT 500.00. NO APOEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,949.67 FILED BY RHODES JACOBS CHIROPRACTIC CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT CISNEROS, JOSE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-03-2011 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
